steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which quotation best illustrates the father's dedication and care for his lawn. The right choice must show a sustained, habitual pattern of careful attention — not just a single moment or emotional reaction.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — [discovering the broken flower]: captures a single discrete moment of reaction, not a pattern of dedicated care over time. ✗
  • Choice B — 'shaving...a priest's chin' / 'All during the season...after supper' / 'strong and healthy grass': provides a vivid metaphor for meticulous technique, evidence of sustained effort across an entire season, and proof of successful results — the fullest picture of dedication and care. ✓
  • Choice C — [a pause in work]: shows a moment of rest, not the ongoing pattern of careful tending the claim requires. ✗
  • Choice D — [Jim's emotional response]: focuses on Jim's feelings, not the father's habitual behavior. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
